brief_justification: Answers 'chart table' but correct answer is 'personal bag' — Jack moved the logbook to his personal bag, so Mike would look there; Surface-level reasoning that stops at the early part of the story without tracking object movement; No self-monitoring or questioning of whether the logbook moved after being found on the chart table; No verification against later story events; Presents answer as certain with no hedging; No alternative locations considered; Cites one quote but fails to trace the full chain of object relocations
